{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323145215A2FBF44BBC5B8A58A90A"}"},"total":1083},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7588099740921496344","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"本人20年书虫说：第一次看到这样的设定，很不错。情节也很好，没有喳喳哇哇的人设。情节宏大，只要作者最后不写崩，这绝对是继(遮天）后又一本好看的书。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1766745692,"group_id":"7561276556807506969","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"单机日更30000字，不会作诗也会吟","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N4fOkYMWcNcMKYkfhK77DOcQLYQqbCE00BRImuVB6FHI","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-0000/51cdc818263941cb8985f97b486ddd11~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776792384&x-signature=KUBTWgwKQKH0JBy2IKzfz54hBDI%3D","user_id":"4292106019669949","user_name":"行走的道"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"4292106019669949","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7561276556807506969","book_info":{"abstract":"【不压境界，百章内全球无敌，全书实力数据化，快节奏】诸天万族天骄争霸文！诸天第一爽文，燃爆星空！
苏劫穿越成武道世界的终极舔狗，原身气血被班花榨干。绝境中，【诸天最强武道系统】激活，奖励至尊级呼吸法——每秒自动增加1点气血！
当别人苦修一天，他呼吸一秒。十几分钟，武窍圆满；一夜之间，战力破百。
“武窍淬炼是吞金兽？”苏劫看着系统中每秒疯涨、永不断档的浩瀚气血，笑了。
他的目标，是那神话传说中无人能达到的——九十九窍，十级圆满，铸就无上道基！
【武窍】【武脉】【武骨】【武魂】【战体】【神藏】【法相】【法环】【至强法则】，狗系统，给我全部强化加满！
这是一条独属于挂逼的碾压之路。以无敌之姿，横扫诸天！
诸天因我而苏，万界以我为劫，我之名，便是尔等的命数！","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/742d27ca71145e41fc1b420a21a06e9c","author":"逸萱之殇","author_id":"","book_id":"7561276556807506969","book_name":"高武：每秒都在变强，撑爆宇宙","book_short_name":"无限战力之巅","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#280808","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"27.6万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":1014,"name":"都市高武","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1014&name=都市高武&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1,"name":"都市","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1&name=都市&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":71,"name":"诸天万界","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=71&name=诸天万界&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":830,"name":"升级流","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=830&name=升级流&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7561276665238651417","read_count":"275997","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"1100061"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"7.8","serial_count":"524","tags":"都市高武,都市,系统,穿越,诸天万界,升级流","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/0afe489cf442b69a36bd941853935555~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779432735&x-signature=NAaSxM2uskeDrG52BJ7BBbiXUAM%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"153555644197900","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"125"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323145215A2FBF44BBC5B8A58A90A"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读7小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":13,"forwarde
